decisions.title_en: Fable 5 ban: today is refund deadline, 300+ security experts revolt, Anthropic pushes Seoul reopening and says models back 'in days'
decisions.reason: Previously published 06-13 (initial export-ban) and 06-15 (Frontier Red Team to DC / Amazon trigger). Substantively new: (1) the trigger detail now public — White House flagged SK Telecom (a $100M Anthropic investor) as China-risk + Amazon-reported Fable jailbreak via 'Fix this code'; (2) 300+ cybersecurity leaders (Stamos, Schneier, Casey Ellis, Rachel Tobac) signed freefable.org open letter; (3) David Sacks' fix-or-de-deploy ultimatum to Dario revealed; (4) June 20 refund cutoff + identity-verification system (~July 8) for US-person access; (5) Anthropic MD Chris Ciauri says models return 'in days'. All new since 06-15.

decisions.title_en: Cornell WARP attack: 13 words in a Reddit comment can steer ChatGPT Deep Research and Gemini toward scams
decisions.reason: story_key not in lookback. Cornell Tech (Zhang, Triedman, Shmatikov) WARP poisoning of deep-research agents hit mainstream coverage June 18-19; 38-62% redirection success with ~13-word poisoned UGC.

decisions.title_en: Snap unveils $2,195 SPECS AR glasses with Claude Code, Codex and Cursor built in
decisions.reason: story_key not in lookback. Consumer AR-glasses launch June 16 with deep AI coding-agent integration; dual Snapdragon, 51° FOV, fall-2026 ship.

decisions.title_en: Agentjacking: fake Sentry errors hijack Claude Code, Cursor and Codex with 85% success, 2,388 orgs exposed
decisions.reason: story_key not in lookback. New prompt-injection-via-error-message attack class against agentic coding tools; 85% exploitation rate, 2,388 organizations exposed.

decisions.title_en: Microsoft 365 Copilot 'SearchLeak' (CVE-2026-42824): one click silently exfiltrates mailbox, calendar and files
decisions.reason: story_key not in lookback. Varonis-disclosed three-stage SearchLeak chain (prompt injection + HTML race + Bing SSRF CSP bypass); public disclosure 06-15 (exactly 5 days, within window), server-side patched early June.

decisions.title_en: Google's first smart speaker in 6 years: $99 Gemini Home Speaker opens pre-orders
decisions.reason: story_key not in lookback. Pre-orders opened 06-17 (ships 06-25, $99.99); Gemini-for-Home native conversational speaker, first Google speaker since 2020.

decisions.title_en: Anthropic launches Claude Corps, a Peace-Corps-style fellowship for early-career Americans applying AI to community work
decisions.reason: story_key not in lookback. National fellowship modeled on AmeriCorps/Peace Corps for civic AI deployment, launched amid Anthropic's policy push.

decisions.title_en: OpenAI acquires Astral (uv, ruff, ty) to boost Codex
decisions.reason: Announced March 19 2026; ~93 days old, far beyond 5-day window. Resurfaced in June recaps but underlying event is March.

decisions.title_en: MiniMax M3 open-weight model tops SWE-Bench Pro vs GPT-5.5
decisions.reason: Launched June 1 2026; 19 days old, beyond 5-day window.

decisions.title_en: SpaceX unveils AI1 orbital data-center satellite
decisions.reason: Unveiled June 8-9 2026; 11-12 days old, beyond 5-day window.

decisions.title_en: Gemini 3.5 Pro still pending public launch
decisions.reason: No actual launch event — still limited Vertex preview as of 06-19, only Polymarket odds and speculation. No shippable development to report.

decisions.title_en: Amodei and Hassabis call for US-led AI coalition at G7
decisions.reason: Already published 06-17 (g7-ai-ceos-summit) with the same US-led AI coalition / structured access / China-excluding chip trade content. No new info.

decisions.title_en: ChatGPT now reaches 44% of US adults
decisions.reason: Adoption stat with no clear dated primary survey release this week; overlaps prior chatgpt-1-billion-mau milestone coverage. Insufficient fresh, verifiable hook.

decisions.title_en: Amazon custom silicon (Trainium/Graviton/Nitro) tops $20B run rate
decisions.reason: Ongoing run-rate stat without a clear dated announcement this week; no single authoritative primary event in the 5-day window.
